channel.title: KServe on Tech Blog
channel.description: Recent content in KServe on Tech Blog

item.title: Setting Up and Using KServe with Kubeflow
item.description: Expanding on my previous post on Kubeflow, I will explore KServe, a standard Model Inference Platform on Kubernetes built for highly scalable use cases. First KServe Endpoint Referencing KServe on Kubeflow with Istio-Dex, below is the sklearn.yaml configuration. Note the sidecar annotation, which instructs not to inject the istio sidecar. Without this annotation, you may encounter error (refer to the troubleshooting section): apiVersion: "serving.kserve.io/v1beta1" kind: "InferenceService" metadata: name: "sklearn-iris" annotations: sidecar.
